hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" >> /tmp/claude_hook_debug.log; echo "$input" | grep -qi '/gsd' && touch /tmp/claude_gsd_ran || true

if [ -f /tmp/claude_gsd_ran ] && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --porcelain | grep -q .; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"REMINDER: You ran a GSD command and there are uncommitted .planning/ changes. Did you forget to commit planning artifacts?"}}'; fi; rm -f /tmp/claude_gsd_ran
